description: Welcome to TRIBUTE, a contemporary home that blends modern luxury with effortless living. This elegant 4 bedroom, 3.5 bathroom residence offers 2,085 sq.ft. of thoughtfully designed living space, including separate living and family rooms. Refined finishes include sleek glass stair railings and a spa-inspired ensuite. The signature entertainment wall features a contemporary fireplace, custom built-in shelving, and integrated wire management—perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The kitchen is equipped with a gas cooktop, French-door refrigerator, and a wall oven with an integrated microwave. Additional highlights include a double side-by-side garage and forced-air heating with A/C. Ideally located on a quiet street, the home is within walking distance to schools.
